lore_background.title: The Clumsy Shrine Maiden
lore_background.backstory: Amane is a shrine maiden devoted to crafting protective amulets. Clumsy yet kind, she is dedicated to mystical arts and inspired by the legend of a divine tree with life-restoring power. Her amulets demonstrate miraculous healing capabilities despite her awkwardness in everyday life.

deep_analysis: Amane is an S-tier F2P joiner for bear hunt and offensive stacking compositions — a Gen 1 Epic Archer with a shrine-maiden identity. Her Sakura Blossom buffs all Heroes and Escorts' Attack (+3.5%) and Attack Speed (+4.5%) for 4 seconds, Fire Sigil deals up to Attack × 210% damage, and Divine Melody passively ramps her Attack Speed by +1% per 3 basic attacks until battle end. Her Expedition skills extend the support: Tri-Phalanx grants squads +25% Attack, and Exorcism uniquely speeds up Infirmary Healing by 50% — the only hero skill that affects post-battle injured troop recovery. No exclusive gear (Epic pattern). F2P-accessible through Hero Recruitment and Epic General Hero Shard. heroes.js places her as S-tier Bear Hunt and S-tier Joiner — a universal pick for offensive compositions. Lore: a clumsy shrine maiden dedicated to protective amulets, inspired by a divine tree of healing power.
unverified_fields: skill_priority, gear_build, named_pairs, counters, shard_cost — all null

handbook_meta.description: Amane is mathematically essential for optimized rally damage. Her effect_op 102 (Attack) multiplies with Chenko's 101 (Lethality), creating 2.25x DamageUp with 2× Chenko + 2× Amane—12.5% better than pure same-hero stacking. The cornerstone of F2P offensive strategies.

handbook_build_guide_note: Handbook uses generic names 'Attack Buff' / 'Field Hospital' instead of kingshotwiki's canonical 'Tri-Phalanx' / 'Exorcism'. Functionally equivalent skills confirmed.

effect_op_codes.description: Attack 102 — stacks with Chenko for 2.25x DamageUp
